examples.text: This makes being creative a biological mandate, as what we seek in art and technology is surprise, not simply a fulfillment of expectations.
examples.explanation: 这使得创造力成为一种生物性的必然要求，因为我们在艺术和技术中追求的是惊喜，而不仅仅是满足预期。

reviewSessions.example_text: This makes being creative a biological mandate, as what we seek in art and technology is surprise, not simply a fulfillment of expectations.
reviewSessions.feedback: 未作出有效释义，未体现“必然要求”的含义。
missing_points: mandate 在此处表示“必然要求”
句中 biological mandate 指“生物性的必然要求”
整体句意与创造力是人类/生物层面的要求有关
